Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to an Excel file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
Do 'LoadGridState'
Do 'WriteFilters'
Do 'WriteColumnTitles'
Do 'WriteData'
Do 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'OpenDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportwwClienteTelevendas-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx"
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not (&PesIntVenCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Vended.") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesIntVenCod EndIf
If not (&PesIntBlo.IsEmpty()) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = '' do Case Case &PesIntBlo.ToString().Trim() = "0" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Somente Meus Clientes"
Case &PesIntBlo.ToString().Trim() = "1" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = " Clientes Liberados para Venda"
Case &PesIntBlo.ToString().Trim() = "2" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = " Somente Clientes no 1"
EndCase EndIf
If not (&PesCod.IsEmpty() AND &PesCidAreCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Cliente") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCod WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, false, &CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2, "Área(Cliente)") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Number = &PesCidAreCod EndIf
If not (&PesPrxLigDta.IsEmpty() AND &PesPrxLigDta_To.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Agenda") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesPrxLigDta WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, false, &CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2, "até") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesPrxLigDta_To EndIf
If not (&TodosAgendados.IsEmpty()) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = &TodosAgendados.ToString() EndIf
If not (&PesSts.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Pessoa Ativo/Inativo") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesSts.EnumerationDescription() EndIf
If not (&PesIsCli.IsEmpty() AND &PesIsCli_To.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Pessoa Cliente") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesIsCli.ToString() WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, false, &CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2, " - ") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = &PesIsCli_To.ToString() EndIf
If not (&PesCliHabVenInt.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Habilitado Vendas Internas") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesCliHabVenInt.ToString() EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesRaz1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Razão Cliente" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesRaz1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF Estado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Ramo Ativ." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta1.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Última Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To1 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesRaz2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Razão Cliente" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesRaz2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF Estado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Ramo Ativ." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta2.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Última Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To2 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesRaz3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Razão Cliente" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesRaz3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF Estado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Ramo Ativ." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta3.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Última Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To3 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 4 &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(4) &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesRaz4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Razão Cliente" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesRaz4) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF Estado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod4) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod4 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom4) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Ramo Ativ." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod4 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf4) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta4.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Última Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta4 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To4 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 5 &DynamicFiltersEnabled5 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(5) &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesRaz5.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Razão Cliente" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesRaz5) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidUfeCod5.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "UF Estado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidUfeCod5) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidCod5.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Código Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCidCod5 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCidNom5.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCidNom5) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &RatCod5.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Ramo Ativ." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &RatCod5 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf5.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&PesCpf5) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To5.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PesUltVenDta5.IsEmpty() OR not &PesUltVenDta_To5.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Última Compra" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesUltVenDta5 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "até" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesUltVenDta_To5 EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf EndIf EndIf &CellRow += 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Cliente" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "Razão Social" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Proxima.Ligação" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = "UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = "Classif." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Text = "Ult.Venda" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Text = "Int." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Text = "Ext."
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each order EmpCod PesSts PesIsCli PesCliHabVenInt PesRaz when &OrderedBy = 1 order EmpCod PesSts PesIsCli PesCliHabVenInt PesCidUfeCod PesCidNom PesRaz when &OrderedBy = 2 order EmpCod PesSts PesIsCli PesCliHabVenInt PesPrxLig PesRaz when &OrderedBy = 3 order EmpCod PesSts PesIsCli PesCliHabVenInt (PesUltVenDta) PesRaz when &OrderedBy = 4
using DSwwClienteTelevendas(&PesIntVenCod, &PesIntBlo, &PesCod, &PesCidAreCod, &PesPrxLigDta, &PesPrxLigDta_To , &TodosAgendados, &PesSts, &PesIsCli, &PesIsCli_To, &PesCliHabVenInt, &DynamicFiltersSelector1 , &PesRaz1, &PesCidUfeCod1, &PesCidCod1, &PesCidNom1, &RatCod1, &PesCpf1 , &PesUltVenDta1, &PesUltVenDta_To1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &PesRaz2, &PesCidUfeCod2 , &PesCidCod2, &PesCidNom2, &RatCod2, &PesCpf2, &PesUltVenDta2, &PesUltVenDta_To2 , &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &PesRaz3, &PesCidUfeCod3, &PesCidCod3, &PesCidNom3 , &RatCod3, &PesCpf3, &PesUltVenDta3, &PesUltVenDta_To3, &DynamicFiltersEnabled4, &DynamicFiltersSelector4 , &PesRaz4, &PesCidUfeCod4, &PesCidCod4, &PesCidNom4, &RatCod4, &PesCpf4 , &PesUltVenDta4, &PesUltVenDta_To4, &DynamicFiltersEnabled5, &DynamicFiltersSelector5, &PesRaz5, &PesCidUfeCod5 , &PesCidCod5, &PesCidNom5, &RatCod5, &PesCpf5, &PesUltVenDta5, &PesUltVenDta_To5)
// Write cell values &CellRow += 1
Do 'BeforeWriteLine' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Number = PesCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(PesRaz) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Date = PesPrxLig &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(PesCidUfeCod) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(PesCidNom) If Not PesClaTip.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = PesClaTip.EnumerationDescription() Endif &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Date = PesUltVenDta &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Number = PesIntVenCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Number = PesExtVenCod
Do 'AfterWriteLine'
Endfor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"wwClienteTelevendasGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwClienteTelevendasGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwClienteTelevendasGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESINTVENCOD" &PesIntVenCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESINTBLO" &PesIntBlo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCIDARECOD" &PesCidAreCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESPRXLIGDTA" &PesPrxLigDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PesPrxLigDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TODOSAGENDADOS" &TodosAgendados.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISCLI" &PesIsCli.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PesIsCli_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCLIHABVENINT" &PesCliHabVenInt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'BeforeWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AfterWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
